ValidationRule.description: Force users to link an Asset to Ticket unless the Non Carlyle Asset checkbox is set to True
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( pro_Asset__c = NULL, pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c = FALSE, CreatedDate >= DATETIMEVALUE("2025-05-21 00:00:00") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Tickets must be linked to an Asset. To override this, check the NA Asset checkbox.
